stages.task: Scrape startup data from 4 sources (IH revenue pages, PH launches, HN Show, Crunchbase seed-stage)
Dedupe, normalize fields (name, niche, revenue_range, tech_stack, growth_channel, months_to_revenue), tag categories
Run pattern analysis: top niches by revenue, fastest growth channels, common tech stacks, revenue model distribution, time-to-first-dollar clustering
Generate 5 Twitter threads (data-backed), 1 long-form post, 1 PDF report for Gumroad ($19-29)
